blocks.text: Norway at San Siro — Glimt's Champions League moment is here
A 3-1 aggregate lead and the belief of a nation — Bodø/Glimt arrive in Milan for the most important match in Norwegian club history. One more result seals the last eight.
🎮 13:00 — rain (100 Thieves) vs MANA in DraculaN Season 5, CS2
⚽ 21:00 — Olympiacos at Bayer Leverkusen, Champions League second leg
